name: Grisim School Bus
carrier_operation: Intrastate Non-Hazmat; MN Passenger, Exempt For-Hire
fmcsa_status: Inactive (USDOT inactive in SAFER as of lookup)
inc_date: 1984 (Curt & Connie Grisim purchased Glover's Bus Company in Stewartville; corporate entity 'Grisim School Bus Inc' formed thereafter; verify exact filing date at Minnesota SOS mblsportal.sos.mn.gov)
officers: Kurt Grisim (President) - likely same person, name variant
entity_status: likely inactive/merged - acquired by Schmitty & Sons on 7/1/2025
registry_source: Minnesota Secretary of State (mblsportal.sos.mn.gov) - not directly verified via WebFetch
notes: USDOT 840512 is a definitive name+city match (Grisim School Bus Inc, 628 Hwy 63 SE, Stewartville, MN). USDOT shows INACTIVE because Schmitty & Sons merged with/acquired Grisim School Bus Inc on July 1, 2025 - Schmitty now operates the ISD 534 Stewartville contract. Fleet composition pre-acquisition: 18 school buses, 6 buses (16+ pass), 6 vans, 3 trailers; 35 drivers. Annual mileage only 1 mile in 2024 per recent SAFER data (consistent with inactivation). Founded by Ken Grisim in Northfield MN; Curt/Connie purchased Glover's Bus Co in Stewartville in 1984 and built it into Grisim School Bus Inc; awarded Stewartville Transit Bus contract 1990. ALREADY ACQUIRED - not a live tuck-in target for Summit.
